# web-chat 配置项

<!-- GENERATED by rtime_config.schema_to_markdown — do not edit by hand. Regenerate: python -m rtime_config <module:Model> and review the diff. -->

| 字段 | env 名 | 类型 | 默认值 | 秘密 | 生效 | 说明 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `bind` | `WEB_CHAT_BIND` | string | `127.0.0.1` |  | restart | HTTP bind host. 127.0.0.1 (default) = internal only; tailnet exposure = 0.0.0.0 + Tailscale ACL (design §5.3). |
| `port` | `WEB_CHAT_PORT` | integer | `8788` |  | restart | HTTP bind port (design §5.3). |
| `state_dir` | `RTIME_WEB_CHAT_STATE_DIR` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Session store + any future per-channel state dir. from_env default = ~/.local/state/rtime-assistant/web-chat (expanded). |
| `claude_cli` | `CLAUDE_CLI_PATH` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | The claude CLI / claude-rtime wrapper. Empty + not on PATH => model disabled (echo only). from_env resolves CLAUDE_CLI_PATH then PATH. |
| `model` | `DEFAULT_MODEL` | string | `""` (empty) |  | hot | Default model; "" => wrapper default (kimi-code). |
| `permission_mode` | `PERMISSION_MODE` | string | `default` |  | restart | Model CLI permission mode for NON-read-only profiles. A read_only profile forces READONLY_PERMISSION_MODE in code regardless. |
| `default_cwd` | `DEFAULT_CWD` | string | `""` (empty) |  | restart | Where the model runs; "" => $HOME. ~ expanded. |
| `archive_root` | `WEB_CHAT_ARCHIVE_ROOT`, `RTIME_CHAT_ARCHIVE_ROOT` | string | null | `null` |  | restart | 通道无关聊天归档根(design chat-archive-storage §1):设置即启用 rtime_chat_runtime.archive 的按日分片 envelope 归档(<root>/raw/web/YYYY/MM/DD/events.jsonl);None=web 零归档(现状)。重启级。 |
| `archive_mode` | `WEB_CHAT_ARCHIVE_MODE` | string | `events` |  | restart | 归档模式 off\|events\|full:off=不落盘;events=raw envelope 层;full=预留(A2 transcript)。仅当 archive_root 设置时生效。重启级。 |
| `mcp_config` | `WEB_CHAT_MCP_CONFIG` | string | null | `{"mcpServers": {}}` |  | restart | Process-default MCP config for the model CLI (inline JSON or a path). Default / empty => no MCP servers (skips ~1.4s cold-start). A profile's channels.web.mcp_servers OVERRIDES this per web session (web is a gateway-only consumer: no /mnt/brain mount, design §5.3). 重启级。 |
| `show_tool_calls` | `WEB_CHAT_SHOW_TOOL_CALLS` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Reveal which tools ran. Off => a single generic “查阅中…” status frame while streaming (mirrors QQ_SHOW_TOOL_CALLS). |
| `run_timeout_seconds` | `WEB_CHAT_RUN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | number | `600.0` |  | restart | Hard wall-clock ceiling per model run; a hung run is killed + reported. |
| `read_only` | `WEB_CHAT_READ_ONLY` | boolean | `false` |  | restart | Process-wide read-only door (WEB_CHAT_READ_ONLY=1). MONOTONIC: True forces read-only ON for EVERY web profile; it can only STRENGTHEN a profile's own read_only, never weaken it (fail-closed union). 重启级,不热切。 |
| `log_level` | `WEB_CHAT_LOG_LEVEL` | string | `INFO` |  | restart | Log level. WEB_CHAT_DEBUG=1 forces DEBUG (overrides WEB_CHAT_LOG_LEVEL) in from_env. |
